Params: {3: 'Alpha braces for violence. Fangs, claws, and killing blows.'}
{3: 'Instead, the massive creature pulls her into a desperate embrace, almost pleading.'}
{3: 'The moment their bodies touch, the white fog closes in, rushing toward them like a wave that has finally found its shore.'}
{3: 'Her M.I.N.D. splits at the seams, shredded and remade in the same breath. The fog churns around her as countless fragmented scenes and distant conversations flood her memories.'}
{1: '1', 2: '???', 3: 'Wow... so pretty! One, two, three... Whoa... so many night lights!', 4: '1'}
{2: '??', 3: 'Silly girl. You can\'t reach them like that.', 4: '2'}
{2: '??', 3: 'These night lights are actually somewhere very, very far away.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'That voice... Why does it sound so... familiar?'}
{2: '???', 3: 'Tomorrow... the others and I are going on a long trip.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Why does hearing that voice make her feel so... sad...?'}

{3: 'Within her M.I.N.D., countless viscous shards of memory swirl around her in a dizzying vortex. Alpha drifts like a lone vessel caught in a riptide, struggling to navigate the storm of illusions.'}
{3: 'These memories... are they hers? Who... is it?'}
{1: '1', 2: '???', 3: 'Pointing a weapon at... still calling yourself...', 4: '1'}
{2: '???', 3: 'That doesn\'t excuse what you did... you know...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The phantoms drifting through her M.I.N.D. begin to fade, and she sees...'}
{3: '...A building on the surface, swallowed by fire.'}
{3: 'She runs through the labyrinth built from countless fragmented moments she cannot name.'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'But I don\'t want to... I just want to find Mom and Dad...'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Luna', 3: 'The little sister who followed you around and couldn\'t live without you...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: '...is alive and standing right in front of you.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'And now you\'re going to leave me?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Unknown Construct α', 3: 'The error... must end here...', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Alpha', 3: 'To create new alternatives, I need a power of deterrence.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Visions flash across her sight, distorted and surreal. Some are battlefields she remembers carving with her own hands. Others... are never "seen" by her.', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Her teeth grind against the pain. Each step is a white-hot blade, and through her M.I.N.D., the memory shards of "Alpha" scream like a blizzard.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Not from fear or emotion, but from something deeper... a simultaneous repulsion and attraction toward the "truth."', 4: '1'}
{1: 'And with every step, the shell named "Alpha" fissures a little more, peeling back to reveal the raw, bloodied nerves of "Lucia" beneath.', 4: '1', 7: '1'}
{3: 'She stands alone at the center of this desolate void. Light and shadow cleave through her spine, laying bare flesh and blood.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'She sees herself wandering through the frozen sea.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'She sees herself hiding in the ruins.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'She sees herself standing in the snowfields.'}
{3: 'The long blade shrinks rapidly in her grip. Barefoot now, she runs across the boundless snow.'}
{3: 'She must push through it all. Break past the surface. Plunge into the deepest depths of this raging torrent.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Her silhouette blurs, merging with the stardust of years gone by.'}
{3: 'Through the strange weave of fate... something waits at the end. Her "starting point," hazy and indistinct.'}
{3: 'Suddenly, her consciousness flickers out. Silence swallows everything.'}
{2: 'Mother', 3: 'Oh, look at her... she\'s so pretty.'}
{3: 'Her eyes won\'t open. The world is reduced to soft, blurred light.'}
{3: 'A gentle voice sings her down into sleep. Alpha slips away, cradled in the Fog.'}
